disabled: Voice input is disabled for this dealership. Type your notes below.
notSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge on your tablet.
permissionDenied: Microphone blocked. Open site settings and allow mic access, then reload.
noSpeech: No speech heard. Tap the mic or hold push-to-talk and speak closer to the tablet.
languageNotSupported: Language not supported on this device. Type your notes instead.
network: Voice recognition needs network access. Check Wi‑Fi in the service bay.
audioCapture: Microphone unavailable. Check that no other app is using the mic.
notAllowed: Microphone blocked. Allow mic access for this site in Chrome or Edge settings.
serviceNotAllowed: Voice recognition is blocked by browser policy. Use manual typing.
genericError: Voice input error. You can keep typing manually.
